title: Feature: Pipeline Phase Pre-condition Gates (ADR-2603311900)

steps.description: Add SessionStatus::Incomplete variant to session.rs and update Display, Serialize, Deserialize, and all match arms. Add CompletionOutcome enum (Approved, Skipped, Aborted).
steps.done_condition: cargo check passes. SessionStatus::Incomplete compiles. hex dev list shows 'incomplete' for sessions with completed_steps=[] and quality_result=None.

steps.description: In tui/mod.rs: write session.adr_path, session.workplan_path, and session.swarm_id to session JSON immediately when each TUI phase produces its artifact. Call session.save() after each assignment. Affects: run_adr_phase completion handler, run_workplan_phase completion handler, run_swarm_phase completion handler.
steps.done_condition: After running hex dev TUI through workplan phase: session JSON on disk has workplan_path set. After swarm phase: swarm_id set. Verified by reading ~/.hex/sessions/dev/<id>.json.

steps.description: Implement check_phase_preconditions(phase: PipelinePhase) -> Result<(), PreconditionError> in tui/mod.rs. For each phase, check the required upstream session field exists and the artifact is readable. PreconditionError contains: message, suggested_return_phase. Called at the start of run_workplan_phase, run_swarm_phase, run_code_phase, run_validate_phase, run_commit_phase.
steps.done_condition: When session.workplan_path=None, run_code_phase presents a blocking dialog instead of silently skipping. cargo test passes. The 'warn + skip to Validate' path in run_code_phase is removed.

steps.description: Implement finalize_session(outcome: CompletionOutcome) -> Result<()> in tui/mod.rs. For Approved: check swarm_id+tasks_completed invariant, set Completed. For Skipped/Aborted: set Paused. Remove all 4 direct assignments of SessionStatus::Completed (lines 1371, 1942, 2109, 2132) and replace with calls to finalize_session.
steps.done_condition: cargo check passes. All 4 direct SessionStatus::Completed assignments replaced. Calling finalize_session(Approved) with 0 swarm tasks returns an error. Calling with tasks_completed > 0 sets Completed.

steps.description: Fix handle_commit_gate: change GateResult::Skip | GateResult::Retry to call finalize_session(CompletionOutcome::Skipped) instead of setting SessionStatus::Completed directly.
steps.done_condition: Selecting Skip at commit gate: session.status = Paused in the saved JSON. hex dev list shows the session as paused.

steps.description: Fix advance_to_next_phase at PipelinePhase::Commit: instead of setting Completed directly, call self.run_commit_phase() so the gate dialog runs.
steps.done_condition: Advancing past Commit via keyboard: commit gate dialog appears. SessionStatus::Completed only set after user selects Approve.

steps.description: Update hex dev list (hex-cli/src/commands/dev.rs) to detect Incomplete sessions: any Completed session with completed_steps.is_empty() && quality_result.is_none() renders as 'incomplete' status badge with a hint column showing 'phases skipped — no code'.
steps.done_condition: hex dev list --all shows session 6481890c with status 'incomplete' and hint text. New Paused sessions show 'paused'.

steps.description: Remove git-status fallback heuristics from hex report (report.rs) now that session fields are reliably populated. Keep git fallback only as a secondary display in Files Changed section. Update gather_adr_info and gather_workplan_info to use session fields as the primary source.
steps.done_condition: hex report latest shows Phase 1/2/3 from session fields (not git fallback) for sessions created after this fix. Existing sessions still use git fallback.

steps.description: Integration test: run hex dev TUI in headless/quick mode for a minimal feature. Verify session JSON has adr_path, workplan_path, swarm_id set. Verify Code phase runs (not skipped). Verify finalize_session invariants are checked. Verify Completed is only set when tasks_completed > 0.
steps.done_condition: cargo test passes. End-to-end test shows: session fields populated, code phase not skipped, completion requires task execution, skip at commit = paused.

riskRegister.risk: finalize_session invariant check breaks existing quick-mode / auto-approve flows that complete with 0 tasks (e.g. ADR-only sessions)
riskRegister.mitigation: Check swarm invariant only when session.swarm_id.is_some(). ADR-only sessions have no swarm_id so the check is skipped.

riskRegister.risk: Removing the warn+skip path breaks users who intentionally run partial pipelines
riskRegister.mitigation: PreconditionError gate offers explicit 'Continue anyway' option — intent is captured, not blocked.

riskRegister.risk: Session field population in TUI handlers may be called before the artifact path is confirmed (race condition in async TUI)
riskRegister.mitigation: Write session field only inside the success branch of the phase completion handler, never speculatively.

successCriteria: Running hex dev TUI through a full feature produces a session JSON with adr_path, workplan_path, and swarm_id all set
hex dev list shows 'incomplete' for session 6481890c (completed_steps=[], quality_result=None)
Selecting Skip at the Commit gate sets session.status=paused in the JSON (verified by reading the file)
run_code_phase() no longer contains the 'warn + skip to Validate' path for missing workplan
hex report latest for a new session shows Phase 1/2/3 from session fields, not git fallback
cargo test passes with no regressions in existing TUI tests
